channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260504.1)
item.description:
What's New

feat: Smart Switch for overlay apps (Spotlight/Raycast/Alfred)

Overlay apps now remember their own language state instead of

inheriting from the underlying app.

Changes:

  • enableVietnameseForOverlay(): Apply Smart Switch when overlay opens
  • saveLanguageForOverlay(): Save overlay state when overlay closes
  • saveLanguageForCurrentApp(): Save for overlay bundleId when toggling in overlay
  • Callback signature (Bool) -> (Bool, String?) to pass overlay name
  • Centralized bundleId mapping at OverlayAppDetector.bundleId(forOverlayName:)
  • Overlay guard in handleSmartSwitch to prevent double-fire for Raycast/Alfred

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
